name: Fresh Berry Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the berries and granulated sugar until evenly coated.
3. Stir in the tapioca, lime juice, melted butter, and brown sugar.
4. Spoon the mixture into a baking dish that has been lightly greased.
5. Sprinkle the remaining brown sugar over the top of the filling.
6. Place the cobbler in the oven and bake for 45-50 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and bubbly.
7. Allow the cobbler to cool slightly before serving.
